## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour

What did you expect to happen?

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened? Include any error messages or screenshots.

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11, macOS Sonoma)
- **Node.js version:** (run `node -v`)
- **Deployment:** Docker / Manual VPS / Local dev
- **Browser:** (if this is a UI bug)
